testcase.name: TestDialerCanConnectToInstanceWithMdx
testcase.system-out: cloudsql.go:346: Error reading MDX message: read tcp 127.0.0.1:3307->127.0.0.1:38690: i/o timeout cloudsql.go:348: Fake server received metadata exchange request: [0 0 0 2 16 1 104 101 108 108 111 32 119 111 114 108 100]

testcase.name: TestDialWithAdminAPIErrors
testcase.system-out: 2026/06/16 18:06:40 http: TLS handshake error from 127.0.0.1:47196: read tcp 127.0.0.1:39061->127.0.0.1:47196: use of closed network connection

testcase.name: TestDialerFailsDnsTxtRecordWithInvalidCustomARecords
testcase.system-out: dialer_test.go:1161: timeout dial error: failed to dial (connection name = "db.example.com -> my-project:my-region:my-instance"): dial tcp 1.1.1.1:3307: i/o timeout

testcase.name: TestDialerClosesOldConnectionsOpenAfterDnsChange

received my-instance dialer_test.go:1337: Switching to instance2 server dialer_test.go:1343: Updating DNS record monitored_cache_test.go:32: domain name update.example.com changed from my-instance to testcase.name: TestDialerChecksSubjectAlternativeNameAndFails
testcase.system-out: cloudsql.go:340: Fake server read error: remote error: tls: bad certificate cloudsql.go:358: Fake server write error: remote error: tls: bad certificate

testcase.name: TestDialerRefreshesAfterRotateCACerts/Rotating_all_CAs_causes_error_on_dial,_then_refresh

server read error: remote error: tls: bad certificate dialer_test.go:1691: [my-project:my-region:my-instance] TLS handshake failed: dial error: failed to verify certificate (connection name = "my-project:my-region:my-instance"): tls: failed to verify certificate: x509: certificate signed by unknown authority (possibly because of "crypto/rsa: verification error" while trying to verify candidate authority certificate "Google Cloud SQL Intermediate CA") cloudsql.go:358: Fake server write error: remote error: tls: bad certificate dialer_test.go:1691: [my-project:my-region:my-instance] Removing connection info from cache: dial error: failed to verify certificate (connection name = "my-project:my-region:my-instance"): tls: failed to verify certificate: x509: certificate signed by unknown authority (possibly because of "crypto/rsa: verification error" while trying to verify candidate authority certificate "Google Cloud SQL Intermediate CA") dialer_test.go:1651: got error on dial as expected: dial error: handshake failed (connection name = "my-project:my-region:my-instance"): dial error: failed to verify certificate (connection name = "my-project:my-region:my-instance"): tls: failed to verify certificate: x509: certificate signed by unknown authority (possibly because of "crypto/rsa: verification error" while trying to verify candidate authority certificate "Google Cloud SQL Intermediate CA") dialer_test.go:1672: Second attempt done dialer_test.go:1675: Third attempt... dialer_test.go:1691: [my-project:my-region:my-instance] Connection info added to cache dialer_test.go:1691: [my-project:my-region:my-instance] Connection info refresh operation started dialer_test.go:1691: [my-project:my-region:my-instance] Connection info refresh operation complete dialer_test.go:1691: [my-project:my-region:my-instance] Current certificate expiration = 2026-06-16T19:07:47Z dialer_test.go:1691: [my-project:my-region:my-instance] Connection info refresh operation attempt OK.

testcase.name: TestDialerRefreshesAfterRotateCACerts/Rotating_Client_CA_with_lazy_refresh_causes_error_on_read

Resetting client cert. dialer_test.go:1647: Second attempt should fail... dialer_test.go:1691: [my-project:my-region:my-instance] Connection info is still valid, using cached info dialer_test.go:1691: [my-project:my-region:my-instance] Now = 2026-06-16T18:07:48Z, Current cert expiration = 2026-06-16T19:07:48Z dialer_test.go:1691: [my-project:my-region:my-instance] Cert is valid = true dialer_test.go:1691: [my-project:my-region:my-instance] Dialing 0.0.0.0:3307 dialer_test.go:1691: dial successful cloudsql.go:340: Fake server read error: tls: failed to verify certificate: x509: certificate signed by unknown authority (possibly because of "crypto/rsa: verification error" while trying to verify candidate authority certificate "Google Cloud SQL Signing CA foo:baz") cloudsql.go:358: Fake server write error: tls: failed to verify certificate: x509: certificate signed by unknown authority (possibly because of "crypto/rsa: verification error" while trying to verify candidate authority certificate "Google Cloud SQL Signing CA foo:baz") dialer_test.go:1691: [my-project:my-region:my-instance] IO Error on Read or Write: remote error: tls: unknown certificate authority dialer_test.go:1691: [my-project:my-region:my-instance] Removing connection info from cache: remote error: tls: unknown certificate authority dialer_test.go:1664: got error on read as expected: remote error: tls: unknown certificate authority dialer_test.go:1672: Second attempt done dialer_test.go:1675: Third attempt... dialer_test.go:1691: [my-project:my-region:my-instance] Connection info added to cache dialer_test.go:1691: [my-project:my-region:my-instance] Connection info refresh operation started dialer_test.go:1691: [my-project:my-region:my-instance] Connection info refresh operation complete dialer_test.go:1691: [my-project:my-region:my-instance] Current certificate expiration = 2026-06-16T19:07:48Z dialer_test.go:1691: [my-project:my-region:my-instance] Now = 2026-06-16T18:07:48Z, Current cert expiration = 2026-06-16T19:07:48Z dialer_test.go:1691: [my-project:my-region:my-instance] Cert is valid = true dialer_test.go:1691: [my-project:my-region:my-instance] Dialing 0.0.0.0:3307 dialer_test.go:1691: dial successful dialer_test.go:1680: Third attempt OK.

testcase.name: TestDialerRefreshesAfterRotateCACerts/Rotating_all_CAs_with_lazy_refresh_causes_error_on_dial
testcase.system-out: dialer_test.go:1626: First attempt... dialer_test.go:1691: [my-project:my-region:my-instance] Connection info added to cache dialer_test.go:1691: [my-project:my-region:my-instance] Connection info refresh operation started dialer_test.go:1691: [my-project:my-region:my-instance] Connection info refresh operation complete dialer_test.go:1691: [my-project:my-region:my-instance] Current certificate expiration = 2026-06-16T19:07:49Z dialer_test.go:1691: [my-project:my-region:my-instance] Now = 2026-06-16T18:07:49Z, Current cert expiration = 2026-06-16T19:07:49Z dialer_test.go:1691: [my-project:my-region:my-instance] Cert is valid = true dialer_test.go:1691: [my-project:my-region:my-instance] Dialing 0.0.0.0:3307 dialer_test.go:1691: dial successful dialer_test.go:1631: First attempt OK. Resetting client cert. dialer_test.go:1647: Second attempt should fail... dialer_test.go:1691: [my-project:my-region:my-instance] Connection info is still valid, using cached info dialer_test.go:1691: [my-project:my-region:my-instance] Now = 2026-06-16T18:07:50Z, Current cert expiration = 2026-06-16T19:07:49Z dialer_test.go:1691: [my-project:my-region:my-instance] Cert is valid = true dialer_test.go:1691: [my-project:my-region:my-instance] Dialing 0.0.0.0:3307 dialer_test.go:1691: [my-project:my-region:my-instance] TLS handshake failed: dial error: failed to verify certificate (connection name = "my-project:my-region:my-instance"): tls: failed to verify certificate: x509: certificate signed by unknown authority (possibly because of "crypto/rsa: verification error" while trying to verify candidate authority certificate "Google Cloud SQL Intermediate CA") dialer_test.go:1691: [my-project:my-region:my-instance] Removing connection info from cache: dial error: failed to verify certificate (connection name = "my-project:my-region:my-instance"): tls: failed to verify certificate: x509: certificate signed by unknown authority (possibly because of "crypto/rsa: verification error" while trying to verify candidate authority certificate "Google Cloud SQL Intermediate CA") cloudsql.go:340: Fake server read error: remote error: tls: bad certificate dialer_test.go:1651: got error on dial as expected: dial error: handshake failed (connection name = "my-project:my-region:my-instance"): dial error: failed to verify certificate (connection name = "my-project:my-region:my-instance"): tls: failed to verify certificate: x509: certificate signed by unknown authority (possibly because of "crypto/rsa: verification error" while trying to verify candidate authority certificate "Google Cloud SQL Intermediate CA") dialer_test.go:1672: Second attempt done dialer_test.go:1675: Third attempt... cloudsql.go:358: Fake server write error: remote error: tls: bad certificate dialer_test.go:1691: [my-project:my-region:my-instance] Connection info added to cache dialer_test.go:1691: [my-project:my-region:my-instance] Connection info refresh operation started dialer_test.go:1691: [my-project:my-region:my-instance] Connection info refresh operation complete dialer_test.go:1691: [my-project:my-region:my-instance] Current certificate expiration = 2026-06-16T19:07:50Z dialer_test.go:1691: [my-project:my-region:my-instance] Now = 2026-06-16T18:07:50Z, Current cert expiration = 2026-06-16T19:07:50Z dialer_test.go:1691: [my-project:my-region:my-instance] Cert is valid = true dialer_test.go:1691: [my-project:my-region:my-instance] Dialing 0.0.0.0:3307 dialer_test.go:1691: dial successful dialer_test.go:1680: Third attempt OK.

testcase.name: TestDialerWithMetrics
testcase.system-out: cloudsql.go:340: Fake server read error: read tcp 127.0.0.1:3307->127.0.0.1:56542: i/o timeout cloudsql.go:340: Fake server read error: read tcp 127.0.0.1:3307->127.0.0.1:56544: i/o timeout

testcase.name: TestMonitoredCache_checkDomainName_instanceChanged
testcase.system-out: monitored_cache_test.go:32: domain name update.example.com changed from my-instance to my-instance2, closing all connections.
